item_specifications.breed_recommendation: Dogs(Golden Retriever, Labrador, German Shepherd, Yorkshire Terrier, Beagle, Scottish Collie, Chow Chow)
item_specifications.special_feature: Environmentally Friendly, Machine Washable, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Waterproof

about_item: Orthopedic Support: Our orthopedic dog bed features high-density egg foam to relieve pressure points, helping to evenly distribute weight and providing great support for painful joints and muscles. While fluff-filled bolsters support the neck, back, hips, and joints; helps ease discomfort and promote restful sleep.

Comfort As Priority: Large dog bed with C-shape chaise design creates a cozy and inviting space that promotes comfort and security, offering your pet a variety of cozy positions to snuggle. The fence-like design makes the dogs feel more secure lying in it. The 4-sided 3.5" side bolster of dog pillow adds extra support to your pet's neck and head on for optimum lounging comfort.

Waterproof & Washable Dog Bed: The dog bed features a removable, machine-washable cover with a zipper for easy to quick remove and care, so just throw it in the washing machine and will be as good as new, ensuring your pet's space stays fresh and hygienic. The waterproof inner lining fully protect the foam from spills, water damage, or accidents, prolonging the product's life.

Comfortable Surface Fabric: The sleeping surface of the dog beds large sized dog features luxurious bamboo joint fleece plush make it super soft, cozy and not easy to shedding, the skin-friendly and comfortable surface provides a calm and anti-anxiety feeling for your pet, allowing pets to fall into a deep sleep.

Multiple Size Options: Orthopedic Dog Bed, Medium, 28" x 23" x 6.5" (3.5" Base Foam Height; Sleep Surface: Approx. 20.5" x 19") For Dogs Up to 30 lbs. Large - 35" x 25" x 6.5" (3.5" Base Foam Height;Sleep Surface: Approx. 26.5" x 20") For Dogs Up to 50 lbs. Extra Large - 42" x 32" x 6.5" (3.5" Base Foam Height;Sleep Surface: Approx. 34" x 27.5") For Dogs Up to 90 lbs.XXL -48" x 35" x 6.5" (3.5" Base Foam Height; Sleep Surface: Approx. 39.5" x 31") For Dogs Up to 120 lbs.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed comfortable, soft with egg-crate cushioning, and easy to wash. They appreciate its suitability for senior dogs and consider it good value for money. The size receives mixed feedback - while some find it perfect for large dogs, others note it takes up a very large area. Durability is also mixed, with some finding it very durable while others report it being ripped up after four months of use.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be well-made, particularly suitable for senior dogs, and their pets love using it.

examples.snippet: ...Boy, was I wrong! Great bed, super cozy and full. I was so impressed that I immediately bought a second one. (We have 4 dogs)....
My dog and cat share this bed and there is still extra room. Great quality and very easy to put together. It also came nicely packaged.
...and firm, seems to be very durable and was easy to put together it's nice and thick, the zipper did stick a little but we got through it just fine....
...He just loves it!! Good quality, the mattress is built to distribute the weight (egg tray structure), firm but not stiff, the cover is...

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed comfortable and cozy, with one mentioning that it helped their senior pet sleep more comfortably.

examples.snippet: ...my dog also loves it. its so soft and comfortable that i have to tell my 6 year old son to stay off of it cause he tries to lay on it with the dog....

examples.snippet: ...He seems to like it and like to sleep on it. It is thick and soft. He is about 80 lbs and I got size large. It fits him good. It is slip resistant....

insights.title: Value for money

insights.summary: Customers report that their pets love this bed, with pugs particularly enjoying it, and one customer noting their Great Dane puppy's satisfaction with it.

examples.snippet: My dog loves this bed. I bought a large so she has plenty of room to stretch out or just find a corner next to me in the dining room.

My dog loves it and has plenty of room. So far so good!
Great value for the price! It’s durable and my dog loves it!

My dogs loves it, it have a great size, my 2 mid size dogs are very happy with this, after 3 months I can confirm the item works well.

insights.title: Durability

authors_reviews.title: Soft and Large
authors_reviews.text: Nice and soft. My dog hasn’t used it yet but it feels very comfortable. The dog bed has plenty of room for a golden retriever.
authors_reviews.author: Jessica Dingler

authors_reviews.title: Decent dog bed
authors_reviews.text: I have a border collie my first dog ever so I over estimated how big of a bed she needed. This size is huge for her. I recommend medium size dogs go for the large to medium size unless you have the means of space and your dog likes things larger. The orthopedic foam is ok quality nothing crazy but good for healthy older dog. Removing and washing can be a pain however. The actual pillow casing is soft and the walls built into it are comforting for dogs.
authors_reviews.author: Swan

authors_reviews.title: Good price & quality
authors_reviews.text: This is a great bed and very affordable!! It was really easy to assemble. It is nice and thick but super soft and it doesn't slide around on our wood floor.I have a 60lb Bernese Mt puppy & a 80lb golden retriever. This bed is a size large.
authors_reviews.author: Nicole

authors_reviews.title: Good option
authors_reviews.text: Very comfortable for dogs. Good price.
authors_reviews.author: Juan Sebastian Pellot

authors_reviews.title: Edited: Not completely waterproof but is washable!
authors_reviews.text: Edited: I realized later that the cover is not completely waterproof. It is, if you discover the spill/urine immediately. I unfortunately had to throw this away as the urine soaked through to the inside that is not washable. It's a great dog bed IF your puppy doesn't pee on it. I will purchase another one once she's a little older and I can trust that she won't have an accident in it.This dog bed is perfect for my Golden Retriever Charlee. Charlee uses it for nap time, playtime and snack time. I appreciate that the cover is waterproof and easily zips off to throw in the washing machine. It's very durable and the color goes well with my decor. I didn't notice any smell upon opening from the shipping package. Great product at an affordable price!
authors_reviews.author: TriciaF

authors_reviews.title: Very good choice
authors_reviews.text: Size and comfort are perfect for my dogs
authors_reviews.author: Jesse Tyer

authors_reviews.title: Perfect Dog bed for my Labrador
authors_reviews.text: My Labrador who is 62lbs and on the petite side, loves the bed. She loves the raised sides for her head, provides a pillow for her. The bed is durable and pet-friendly. Very easy to assemble!!!I know some say there is a weird smells when they unwrap the bed from being vacuumed sealed. This bed had no smell at all. My dog climbed on it right away. Great for support and her joints!!!
authors_reviews.author: Jax G

authors_reviews.title: Good size for big dogs
authors_reviews.text: Perfect size for my golden to grow into (currently 8mo and already a good size). This bed is exactly what I was looking for and it’s not too squishy for her.
authors_reviews.author: brooke looney
